title: viola occulta
intro: Viola occulta, also known as the "Heart's Delight" or "Heart's Ease", is a perennial plant belonging to the viola genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to offer health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, promoting a good night's sleep, and providing relief from colds and fever. The herbal preparations of Viola occulta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
